errors.description: Scanner input or scan root is missing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until scanner inputs are present.

errors.description: Scanner input metadata or source material is malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until scanner input can be parsed deterministically.

errors.description: Scanner input metadata is outside the allowed freshness window.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until fresh scan metadata is provided.

errors.description: Scanner input metadata lacks signed evidence.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until signed scanner metadata is present.

errors.description: Scanner input metadata lacks deterministic policy hash or scan scope.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until scan scope and policy binding are unambiguous.

errors.description: Source material contains an implicit trust assumption.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until the trust assumption is replaced by explicit verification.

errors.description: Source material indicates runtime authority may be reused without freshness proof.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until authority freshness is explicitly validated.

errors.description: Source material indicates cached approval state without freshness proof.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until cached approvals are nonce-bound and time-bound.

errors.description: Source material indicates a fallback-to-allow path.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until fallback behavior denies by default.

errors.description: Source material indicates replayable trust state.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until replay binding and freshness proof are present.

errors.description: Source material indicates tracked governance registry mutation.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until registry writes are isolated or explicitly governed.

errors.description: Source material indicates trust material may leak to subprocesses.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until subprocess boundaries are redacted and policy-gated.

errors.description: Source material indicates a runtime policy bypass path.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until all runtime paths are governed by policy brain authority.

errors.description: Source material indicates ambiguous or unsigned governance metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until governance metadata is signed and verifiable.

errors.description: Source material indicates high-risk action without human approval boundary.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until high-risk actions require explicit human approval.

errors.description: Scanner diagnostics contain unsafe or sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Block merge readiness until scanner diagnostics are redacted and hash-only.
